description: Upper part of a late letter in very colloquial Judaeo-Arabic. Dated "16 Shevat" with Arabic numerals. The addressee seems to be Yizhaq al-M[...] and the writer חומן דובשו (??). Mordekhai Kohen is also named in the opening section. The text mentions al-fallāḥīn, laylat al-ʿīd. Needs further examination. ASE.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
